violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A box with potatoes and pasta was stored on the floor in the corner of the kitchen.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw whole beef cuts were stored next to containers of sour cream and over a bag of onions in the reach in cooler in the dining area.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Containers of queso in the walk in cooler were dated best by 9/16/24 and 1/5/2025.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Edges of the wooden shelves in the walk in cooler were bare wood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The bottom cabinets under the microwave and by the fryers need to be cleaned. The outside of the larger upright freezer needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Sleeves of plastic cups were stored on the floor in the corner of the bar.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Water was not draining from the hand sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap was not at the hand sink at the start of the inspection.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the kitchen hand sink did not work. Employee grabbed a roll of paper towels.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. The mechanical fan in the men’s restroom was not working.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the cabinets across from the cooking equipment needs to be cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
